ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Hi Ravi,

We have detected a transaction of ₹5,000 from your account on 15th Apr 2024.

If this was not you, please contact our support team immediately at support@bank.in or call 1800-123-456.

Thank you for banking with us.

Regards,
Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Payroll Update – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an official notice from the HR & Payroll department.

Your payroll for the month of March 2024 has been processed, but we need your confirmation on the bank account details to ensure timely transfer.

Please click on the link below to verify your details:
<URL>

Failure to verify within 48 hours may result in delay in salary credit.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
HR & Payroll Team
